name: Devil's Deal
descrip: A tiny blue can etched with pitch-black patterns, and featuring a substantial warning label written in extremely small type. Drains 1 Spirit, but in exchange, keeps the drinker able to last much longer before they cum by removing 22% of their max Arousal every turn for 11 turns. Consuming more Devil's Deal when it has not yet expired will add to its duration.
useOutcome: |f|GivePerkQuietly|/|Devil's Deal|n||f|ChangePerkDuration|/|Devil's Deal|/|11|n|[AttackerName] downs the tiny can of licorice-flavored syrup, and instantly feels it hit [AttackerHisOrHer] very spiritual core like a bolt of ravenous lusty lighting, keeping [AttackerHimOrHer] amped up for sex while draining a chunk of [AttackerHisOrHer] Spirit!
